post.subject: I got a Gmail account
post.body: A very nice guy on Bluelight gave me a Gmail account still having couple of invites left. I feel so special. I've always wanted one, and now i have one. YAY! Only problem is none of my friends even know what it is...

children.body: I would but i dont have any. They arent giving them out any more - only way you can get one is from someone else who still has invites left.
children.author: obsolete_mind

comments.body:
<small>Ahahahaa.
fuck.
Give me an invite...i just need more prfiles.

comments.body: bonjour mon copain! I have returned and am looking forward to seeing you very soon, hows about tuesday? Maybe monday i dunno, apparently i have this day trip thing. anyways, buns tomorrow somewhere? talk soon! missin ya! luv Rach xxx
